name: CodexBar
description: Private Mattermost bot cards for CodexBar CLI usage and local cost data. Calls codexbar over a remote rexecd gRPC endpoint.

settings_schema.header: CodexBar bot for private usage/cost cards. Deployment coordinates are supplied by CODEXBAR_REXECD_ADDR, CODEXBAR_BIN, and CODEXBAR_CWD on the Mattermost server process.

settings.help_text: When enabled, CodexBar usage cards render Account fields as *** without changing the CodexBar CLI command or output. Enabled by default.
